generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how outdated laws tie our hands in protecting Americans. Remember the 2024 Ohio pipeline sabotage? Local authorities were powerless for critical hours because they needed federal clearance. We need to empower state agencies to act decisively when threats emerge. It's about giving our first responders the tools they need - not about overreach, but about filling dangerous gaps in our security. #ModernizeSecurityLaws #SupportLocalFirstResponders
